reference_policy: official/primary sources first; stricter risk interpretation wins

references.title: GateZero Project Truth
references.why: Defines what the product is and is not; prevents bot/profit hype drift.

references.title: GateZero Product Wedge
references.why: Locks the product promise: no trade without evidence, no execution without risk approval.

references.title: GateZero Risk Rules
references.why: Hard safety constraints that outrank feature appetite.

references.title: Financial Risk Gates
references.why: Defines the allowed autonomy level and promotion/rollback path.

references.title: React Documentation
references.why: Canonical reference for component design, state, effects, and UI composition.

references.title: Vite Documentation
references.why: Build tool, dev server, bundling, env handling.

references.title: WAI Accessibility Guidelines Overview
references.why: Risk warnings, charts, controls, and approval actions must be accessible.

references.title: Playwright Best Practices
references.why: User-facing test strategy for dashboard flows and dangerous-action confirmations.

references.title: TradingView Lightweight Charts Docs
references.why: Lightweight financial charts for candles, equity curves, drawdowns, and overlays.
